scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix "Panel Administrativo ERP" && npm install --prefix "Prototipo App Choferes Transporte"
scripts.build:mobile:gh: npm run build:gh --prefix "Prototipo App Choferes Transporte"
scripts.build:gh: npm run build:admin:gh && npm run build:mobile:gh && node ./scripts/prepare-gh-pages.mjs
